title: Tacwise A7116V Upholstery Air Stapler, Uses Type 71 / 4 - 16 mm Staples, Orange / Black
features: PROFESSIONAL STAPLE GUN - Air operated upholstery stapler supplied in a durable carry case, designed to bring precision and performance to continuous upholstery and general purpose stapling tasks

COMPATIBILITY – Efficient quick-release, bottom-loading magazine enables firing of 180 x type 71 / 4 – 16 mm staples without reloading; we strongly recommend using Tacwise staples for a smooth, uninterrupted performance

MAXIMISED PERFORMANCE – Offers a sequential (single shot) firing mode and comes equipped with a high durability driver blade and quality top-cap exhaust system to offer a low 1.6m/s² vibration emission level for optimised performance while stapling
0.9KG ERGONOMIC DESIGN – Robust, super lightweight design and soft rubber grip providing security and comfort whilst the slender nose allows for precise stapling results

VARIETY OF APPLICATIONS – Professional pneumatic staple gun for a range of general purpose and upholstery applications including stapling chairs, sofas, seats, pelmets, blinds, awnings, insulation, lining and a range of other stapling tasks
AIR COMPRESSOR REQUIRED - Operates between 60 to 100 PSI for fast and accurate stapling (compressor not included)
description: From the manufacturer Tacwise 0367 Type 71 / 6 mm Galvanised Upholstery Staples Tacwise 1014 Type 71 / 6 mm Stainless Steel Upholstery Staples Tacwise 0368 Type 71 / 8 mm Galvanised Upholstery Staples Tacwise 0369 Type 71 / 10 mm Galvanised Upholstery Staples Tacwise 0370 Type 71 / 12 mm Galvanised Upholstery Staples Tacwise 0371 Type 71 / 14 mm Galvanised Upholstery Staples Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 891 4.5 out of 5 stars 32 4.7 out of 5 stars 891 4.7 out of 5 stars 891 4.7 out of 5 stars 891 4.7 out of 5 stars 891 Price — no data — no data £6.13 £ 6 . 13 £6.23 £ 6 . 23 — no data £7.49 £ 7 . 49 SKU 0367 1014 0368 0369 0370 0371 Type Type 71 Type 71 Type 71 Type 71 Type 71 Type 71 Size 6mm 6mm 8mm 10mm 12mm 14mm Finish Galvanised Galvanised Galvanised Galvanised Galvanised Galvanised Pack Size 20,000 20,000 20,000 20,000 20,000 10,000 The A7116V is a standout tool in the Tacwise air staple gun range. A quiet , light and extremely quick to load upholstery stapler which is a first choice for many professional upholsterers . The unique tool fires type 71 upholstery staples with a length of 4-16mm . A highly efficient stapler with a quick-release, bottom-loading magazine with a maximum capacity of 180 staples . We strongly recommend using Tacwise staples for a smooth uninterrupted performance. This pneumatic staple gun operates in a sequential (single shot) firing mode for continuous precise stapling. 0.9kg super lightweight design and high-quality rear exhaust offers a low 1.6m/s² vibration emission level for complete tool control. A highly efficient and powerful tool enhanced with a robust driver blade. A high-quality upholstery staple gun supplied in a durable blow mould carry case and loaded with convenient features including a double safety trigger and soft rubber grip providing safety and comfort for all day use. The slender nose assists in producing precise results during intricate stapling tasks. The A7116V is a pneumatic staple gun suitable for a range of professional , general purpose and upholstery applications including stapling chairs, sofas, seats, pelmets, blinds, awnings, insulation, lining and a range of other upholstery and re-upholstery tasks. Tool operation is between 60-100 PSI , allowing a relatively small air compressor to be used (not included in this purchase). This model comes with: A7116V, Blow mould carry case, Hex key, Air tool oil.
